creator: koshy@india.hp.com
text:
A new port for MHonArc-2.1.

MHonArc is a WWW front end for mail archives.  Mail archives are converted
to a set of indexed, threaded HTML pages.  MIME encoded messages are 
handled correctly.

I found MHonArc to be well documented and highly customizable.

The uuencoded tar.gz for the port is enclosed.  

Happy porting ...
